Skill: Next.js Mastery
Description: Skill for advanced development with Next.js 15+ App Router. Use to manage Server/Client Components, optimization of dynamic routes, streaming and fetching of data with cache by domain. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Objective Design Next.js 15 applications with minimal JS on the client and maximum operational predictability.  ## Rules
Triggers: nextjs mastery, server components, app router, dynamic routes, data fetching, revalidation, next.js advanced
Stack: Next.js 15+ App Router; React 19+; TanStack Query; shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4; Monorepo (apps + packages)
Workflow:
- 1. Mapear rotas e classify cada pagina como Server ou Client Component.
- 2. Define strategy of cache and revalidation by domain of given.
- 3. Implementar errorr boundaries e loading states by segmento of rota.
- 4. Otimizar data fetching with parallel fetch e React cache().
- 5. Medir performance with Web Vitals e bundle analyzer.
Output Contract:
- Mapa of rotas with classificacao Server/Client.
- Matriz of cache e revalidation by dominio.
- Plano of errorr/loading boundaries.
- Relatorio of performance e bundle.
